tools.name: bash
tools.description: Execute a bash command with timeout and working directory support. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.

description.description: A 5-10 word description of what this command does

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds (default: 120000 / 2 minutes, max: 600000 / 10 minutes)

cwd.description: Working directory to execute the command in (optional)
